REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Lot 289, Tract No. 30639, In An Unincorporated Area, Los Angeles, State Of California)
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Adriana Esquer.

The sale was confirmed at $6,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed March 16, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Lot 289, Tract No. 30639, In An Unincorporated Area, Los Angeles, State Of California)
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia for Adriana Esquer.

The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is continued to May 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Navia to file a re-appraisal for sale.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
